greedy-clique-closure.summary: Limit-object framing: reduce to finiteness of the minimal constraint antichain E_inf via density/first-moment bounds, then exact periodicity of V_inf

small-prime-core.last_note: Complete rigorous proof: SCPL descent + companion (threshold a_1) + mod-M periodic enumeration; all lemmas proven; verified a_1 in {15,26,32,48,49,77,105}
small-prime-core.summary: Fix prime universe Q = {p <= a_1} up front; SCPL by minimal-counterexample descent (companion lemma), collapse constraints mod M = prod Q, greedy enumeration of periodic set

wqo-domination.last_note: Complete rigorous proof: independent SCPL descent + minimal family E_inf in finite 2^Q + exact L-periodicity; no gaps
wqo-domination.summary: Independent SCPL descent, then antichain endgame: minimal family E_inf lives in finite 2^Q, large-prime constraints dominated, V_inf exactly periodic
